projects.title: Linksot
projects.description: A high-scale URL shortening platform built to handle 100M+ users and 10M DAU with sub-100ms latency. Features include custom aliases, CRUD APIs, advanced analytics, link expiration, and abuse prevention. Architected for horizontal scalability, 99.99% uptime, and real-time click tracking with device and location insights.

projects.title: Octoviz
projects.description: GitHub profile analyzer that takes a username and visualizes key insights. It showcases activity trends, contribution history, and language usage. The tool also highlights code style patterns and repository stats, providing a complete view of a developer's GitHub footprint.

projects.title: ChaxApp
projects.description: A simple chat application enabling real-time conversations with low latency. Users can change profile pictures, send stickers, and enjoy a smooth messaging experience across devices.
